name: momentum
title: Momentum
description: Control the Momentum macOS app from Raycast. Open the app and settings, list projects, resolve conflicts, and manage manual tracking.
author: miguel_garcia_gonzalez

commands.name: list-projects
commands.title: List Projects
commands.subtitle: Browse projects in Momentum
commands.description: List projects from the paired Momentum app and open one.

commands.name: open-settings
commands.title: Open Momentum Settings
commands.subtitle: Open Raycast integration settings
commands.description: Open Momentum settings focused on Raycast integration.

commands.name: resolve-conflicts
commands.title: Resolve Conflicts
commands.subtitle: Open pending conflict resolution
commands.description: Check for pending conflicts and open resolution in Momentum.

commands.name: manual-start
commands.title: Start Manual Tracking
commands.subtitle: Start tracking for a project
commands.description: Start manual tracking in Momentum with an existing or new project.

commands.name: manual-stop
commands.title: Stop Manual Tracking
commands.subtitle: Stop current manual tracking
commands.description: Stop the active manual tracking session in Momentum.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
